author: gcolvin
content: Yes.  On the ACDE this morning I promised to arrange a breakout to discuss EIP-7979  over the next few weeks.  <@914307919699406908> is kindly helping me.  In the meantime, discussion here and on the Magicians threads is encouraged.  And please reach out to me with any issues.
